title: filipendula palmata var. rufinervis
intro: Filipendula palmata var. rufinervis, also known as the red-veined meadowsweet, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to China and India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Filipendula palmata var. rufinervis include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
